name: SCAN-X
summary: Repository indexing entry for the ``SCAN-X`` project. Index entry in the KFIOSA catalog. Use as a candidate tool in the chain planner. Attribution and provenance only; audit code, releases, and licence before use in the lab or production environment.
algorithms: Nmap scan orchestration (SYN stealth, OS detection, service/version, aggressive)
Lazy Recon: auto local-net detection + neighbor scan
Batch target scan from .txt file ("Massacre Mode")
IP geolocation OSINT via web API
TCP banner grabbing via direct socket connect
novelty: none for WiFi — this is NOT a WiFi/802.11 tool. No monitor mode, probe requests, PMKID, handshake capture, WPS, EAPOL, deauth, beacon parsing, or airodump-ng/aircrack/hcxtools usage. It is a thin Nmap wrapper plus OSINT helpers; relative to airodump-ng/wash/hcxtools/scapy baseline it adds nothing WiFi-relevant and is orthogonal to KFIOSA's WiFi recon pipeline.

trust.warning: External community repo. Audit provenance, code, releases and licence before use. Catalogued for the AI's awareness; novel algorithms are implemented in core/modules/catalog_recon.py, not shelled out to this repo's binaries.

use_cases: Use as a candidate tool in the chain planner; review provenance before use.
Indexing only — no automated invocation. The operator must manually inspect the repository before adding to a toolchain.
